name: Tree of Thoughts
description: Branch reasoning into parallel paths then prune
output_pattern: Problem → Branch(3+) → Evaluate → Prune → Synthesize
best_for: Complex decisions with multiple valid approaches

name: Graph of Thoughts
output_pattern: Nodes → Edges → Cycles → Convergence

name: Chain of Thought
output_pattern: Premise → Step1 → Step2 → ... → Conclusion

name: Analogical Reasoning
description: Map from known domain to unknown
output_pattern: Source Domain → Mapping → Target Domain → Validate

name: First Principles
description: Decompose to fundamental truths then rebuild
output_pattern: Assumption → Decompose → Axioms → Rebuild

name: Six Thinking Hats
output_pattern: White(facts) → Red(emotion) → Black(risk) → Yellow(benefit) → Green(creative) → Blue(process)

name: Pre-mortem Analysis
output_pattern: Assume Failed → Why? → Preventions → Revised Plan

name: Steelmanning
output_pattern: Opposing View → Strengthen → Address Strongest Form

name: Five Whys
output_pattern: Symptom → Why? → Why? → Why? → Why? → Root Cause

name: SWOT Analysis
output_pattern: Internal(S+W) → External(O+T) → Strategy Matrix

name: Comparative Matrix
output_pattern: Options × Criteria → Score → Weight → Rank

name: Inversion
output_pattern: Goal → Invert → What causes failure? → Avoid those

name: MECE Decomposition
output_pattern: Whole → MECE Categories → Sub-categories → Leaf Items
best_for: Structuring complex problems without gaps or overlaps

name: Trade-off Analysis
description: Explicit trade-off mapping with forced ranking
output_pattern: Dimension A vs B → Pareto frontier → Pick acceptable point

name: Root Cause Analysis
output_pattern: Effect → Categories(6M) → Causes → Sub-causes → Root

name: Mental Model Mapping
output_pattern: Concept → Relationships → Gaps → Update

name: Design for X
description: Optimize design for specific quality attribute
output_pattern: Identify X → Principles → Apply → Validate

name: Brainstorming Burst
description: Quantity over quality ideation then filter
output_pattern: Timer(5min) → Generate(20+) → Cluster → Top 5

name: Scenario Planning
output_pattern: Axes(2) → Quadrants(4) → Scenarios → Implications

name: Reflection/Retrospective
description: What went well / what didn't / what to change
output_pattern: Timeline → Went Well → Didn't → Actions

name: Devil's Advocate
output_pattern: Proposal → Challenge each assumption → Defend or modify

name: Empathy Mapping
output_pattern: Says → Thinks → Does → Feels → Insights

name: Timeline Analysis
output_pattern: Events → Timeline → Patterns → Predictions

name: Constraint Flipping
output_pattern: List constraints → Flip each → Evaluate opportunities

name: Pareto Analysis
output_pattern: List all items → Measure impact → Rank → Top 20% focus

name: Gap Analysis
description: Current state vs desired state mapping
output_pattern: Current → Desired → Gaps → Actions to close

name: Monte Carlo Simulation
output_pattern: Variables → Distributions → Simulate(1000x) → Confidence intervals

name: Force Field Analysis
output_pattern: Goal → Driving forces → Restraining forces → Strategy

name: Satisficing
output_pattern: Criteria(minimum) → First option meeting all → Accept

name: Worst Best Plausible
output_pattern: Worst case → Best case → Most plausible → Plan for plausible

name: Rapid Prototyping
description: Build to think rather than think to build
output_pattern: Sketch → Build minimal → Test → Learn → Iterate

name: Balanced Scorecard
output_pattern: Financial → Customer → Process → Learning → Balance

name: Objectives and Key Results
output_pattern: Objective(qualitative) → KR1 → KR2 → KR3(quantitative)

name: Feedback Loop Analysis
output_pattern: Variables → Connections → Loop type → Leverage points

name: A/B Testing Mindset
output_pattern: Hypothesis → Metric → Test Design → Measure → Conclude

name: Jobs to be Done
description: Focus on customer outcome not solution
output_pattern: Situation → Motivation → Expected Outcome → Constraints

name: Working Backwards
description: Start from press release then build
output_pattern: Future State → Announcement → FAQ → Requirements → Plan

name: Eisenhower Matrix
output_pattern: Tasks → Urgent+Important → Important only → Urgent only → Neither

name: Reverse Engineering
output_pattern: System → Components → Interfaces → Principles → Rebuild

name: Systems Thinking
description: See whole system not just parts
output_pattern: Elements → Interconnections → Purpose → Feedback → Emergence
